name: Machine Lateral Raise
resistance_profile: Guided abduction; very stable, easy to take to failure safely.
cues: Lead with the elbows into the pads
execution_steps: Adjust the seat so your shoulders line up with the machine's pivot points.
Sit upright, place your forearms or elbows against the pads, and grip the handles.
Drive your elbows up and out to about shoulder height.
Lower under control back to the start without letting the weight stack crash down.
good_when: You want to train close to failure safely without having to balance free weights.
A novice who wants a stable, guided path with minimal setup.
bad_when: You want lengthened-biased loading — a cable keeps tension through the stretch.
No lateral raise machine is available at your gym.
